summary: Tested remote storage migration from local to external server (files.ihgbrands.com). All backend APIs working correctly - uploads go to remote via SFTP, products return CDN URLs. Frontend displays images through Next.js optimization proxy. Admin catalog image upload form functional.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test image files during backend upload tests - all cleaned up via DELETE API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Remote storage migration complete. 283 files migrated to /var/lexa/ on remote server (178.128.28.178). 231 DB documents updated with CDN URLs. New uploads use SFTP (paramiko). CDN URL format: https://files.ihgbrands.com/lexa/{category}/{filename}. Next.js image optimization proxies CDN URLs via /_next/image. Legacy local file serving preserved as fallback at /api/uploads/files/{category}/{filename}.

backend: POST /api/uploads/image - uploads to remote via SFTP, returns CDN URL ✓
GET /api/catalog/products - returns products with CDN image URLs ✓
GET /api/catalog/products/{slug} - returns product with CDN image URL ✓
CDN images accessible with CORS headers and 30-day cache ✓
GET /api/catalogues - returns catalogues with CDN PDF URLs ✓
frontend: /products page loads product images from CDN via Next.js image optimization ✓
/products/[slug] detail page shows product image from CDN ✓
/admin/catalog - Add Product form has PRIMARY IMAGE section with Upload/URL buttons ✓
/admin/catalog - Add Product form has GALLERY IMAGES section with Upload Images/Add URL buttons ✓
